languages.original_text: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."

languages.text: "Свет очей моих, умоляю, только суйся на нижние палубы за новой порцией вдохновения. Боюсь, твое трепетное сердце может этого не вынести".
"Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."
languages.original_text: "Свет очей моих, умоляю, только суйся на нижние палубы за новой порцией вдохновения. Боюсь, твое трепетное сердце может этого не вынести".

traits.locale_text: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."
"Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."
"Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."

languages.text: 「私の目の中の光よ、お願いだから、下甲板に顔を出して、新しいインスピレーションを浴びてください。あなたの震える心は、それを耐えられないかもしれません」
languages.original_text: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."

traits.locale_text: 「私の目の中の光よ、お願いだから、下甲板に顔を出して、新しいインスピレーションを浴びてください。あなたの震える心は、それを耐えられないかもしれません。」

languages.text: « Lumière de mes yeux, je vous en supplie, n'allez pas vous promener sur les ponts inférieurs si vous cherchez l'inspiration. J'ai bien peur que votre cœur frémissant ne le supporte pas. »
languages.original_text: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."

traits.locale_text: « Lumière de mes yeux, je vous en supplie, n'allez pas vous promener sur les ponts inférieurs si vous cherchez l'inspiration. J'ai bien peur que votre cœur frémissant ne le supporte pas. »

languages.text: "Licht meiner Augen, ich flehe Euch an. Werft einen Blick auf die unteren Decks, um Euch inspirieren zu lassen. Ich fürchte, Euer bebendes Herz könnte den Anblick nicht ertragen."
languages.original_text: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."

traits.locale_text: "Licht meiner Augen, ich flehe Euch an. Werft einen Blick auf die unteren Decks, um Euch inspirieren zu lassen. Ich fürchte, Euer bebendes Herz könnte den Anblick nicht ertragen."

languages.text: "Gözümün nuru... Yalvarırım ilham bulmak için alt güvertelere gidip şöyle bir dolaş. Gerçi titreyen kalbin buna dayanamayabilir."
languages.original_text: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."

traits.locale_text: "Gözümün nuru... Yalvarırım ilham bulmak için alt güvertelere gidip şöyle bir dolaş. Gerçi titreyen kalbin buna dayanamayabilir."

languages.text: «Luz de mis ojos, ve y asómate un momento a las cubiertas inferiores si lo que buscas es inspiración. Algo me dice que quizá sea demasiado para tu sofisticado corazoncito».
languages.original_text: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."

traits.locale_text: «Luz de mis ojos, ve y asómate un momento a las cubiertas inferiores si lo que buscas es inspiración. Algo me dice que quizá sea demasiado para tu sofisticado corazoncito».

languages.text: “我眼中的明光啊，求你快去下层甲板探个头，汲取鲜活的灵感吧。我只怕你那颗颤抖的心会承受不住。”
languages.original_text: "Light of my eyes, I beg you, go and poke your head out on the lower decks for a fresh dose of inspiration. I fear your quivering heart may not be able to bear it."

traits.locale_text: “我眼中的明光啊，求你快去下层甲板探个头，汲取鲜活的灵感吧。我只怕你那颗颤抖的心会承受不住。”
